hero-title: Your trusted SAP partner for enterprise transformation
hero-sub: From S/4HANA conversions to master data governance, from supply chain processes to our own software products — we deliver end-to-end consulting for leading enterprises across the region.
trusted-by: Trusted by leading enterprises in Türkiye and beyond
about-text: Skycon is an information technology and consultancy company specialized in designing, implementing and integrating SAP applications tailored to enterprise customers. We are not just IT experts — we are business process experts who connect technology with your business goals.
about-text-2: According to Gartner, 75% of all ERP projects fail. Whether your organization is new to ERP or a seasoned user of SAP technologies, our team is ready to be your full-service partner.
process_consulting-sub: Although SAP ERP solutions are often seen as IT implementations, they are much more than that. We analyze your business processes and redesign them together with the technology.
end_to_end-sub: From analysis and design to development, testing and go-live — move through the entire project lifecycle with a single partner.
project_management-sub: Using ASAP, SAP Activate, Scrum and Agile methodologies, we manage your ERP and non-ERP projects in a planned, measurable and transparent way.
scm-sub: We manage and optimize the entire flow of materials and operations, from the supplier side to the customer side.
services-sub: Deep expertise in the SAP modules at the core of logistics and procurement
srm-sub: Strategically plan and manage all interactions with third parties that supply goods and services to your organization, and maximize the value of those interactions.
mm-sub: The heart of procurement and inventory management: all tasks within the supply chain, including consumption-based planning, procurement planning, vendor evaluation and invoice verification.
clm-sub: Standardize your source-to-contract processes: simplify procurement, facilitate compliance with negotiated terms and increase your competitive advantage.
mdg-sub: One central, trusted view of master data spread across a diversified system landscape. Consistent master data is the foundation of efficient operational and analytical processes.
wm-sub: Flexible, automated support for processing all goods movements and managing stocks in your warehouse complex, with scheduled and efficient logistics processes.
e_sourcing-sub: Reduce procurement cycle costs by improving the exchange of business documents and shortening processing times, while integrating your suppliers into the procurement process to a much larger extent.
products-sub: Field-proven software products of our own, fully integrated with SAP
product-vp-sub: A supplier portal that digitalizes supply chain processes. It turns quotation collection, purchase order creation and supplier management into a fully digital, end-to-end flow.
product-clm-sub: Manage your contract processes end to end. The entire lifecycle — from contract creation to approval, revisions and deadline tracking — on a single platform.
product-es-sub: A collaboration platform that reduces procurement cycle costs by improving the exchange of business documents and integrating suppliers into the procurement process.
products-cta-title: Would you like to see our products in action?
products-cta-sub: Contact our team for a personalized demo.
news-sub: The latest from our projects and from Skycon
references-sub: We have worked with more than 100 organizations across industries
contact-sub: Reach out to us about your SAP transformation, our products or partnership opportunities. We respond promptly.
footer-about: An information technology company providing SAP consulting, ERP solutions, supply chain management and digital transformation services.
everest-mdg: Everest MDG Project Has Gone Live!
everest-mdg-sub: We are proud to announce the successful completion of another strategic phase in Project Everest, conducted for our valued business partner. We integrated the Bursa and Kayseri natural gas production sites into the SAP MDG-M ecosystem, successfully managing the entire go-live process and keeping data quality at the highest level from design to deployment.
arcelik-s4: Arçelik S/4HANA Project Has Gone Live!
arcelik-s4-sub: Arçelik successfully completed its transition from SAP R/3 to SAP S/4HANA in line with its digital transformation vision. As Skycon, we led the Business Partner integration, activated the budget-controlled procurement structure within SRM, and migrated the end-to-end purchasing flow covering request, approval and purchase order processes to the new system.
dimes-mdg: Dimes MDG Transformation Has Gone Live!
dimes-mdg-sub: Dimes has successfully completed its SAP MDG transformation and is now live with MDG-M and MDG-BP. As Skycon, we managed design, workflows, rules and validations, integrations and go-live activities end to end.
otokar-s4: Otokar S/4HANA Project Has Gone Live!
otokar-s4-sub: Otokar has successfully completed its transition from SAP R/3 to SAP S/4HANA in line with its digital transformation vision. As Skycon, we led all SD (Sales & Distribution) processes for Otokar Türkiye, as well as the SD and MM processes for Otokar Romania and Otokar France.
tanap-clm: A New Era in Contract Management
tanap-clm-sub: TANAP (Trans Anatolian Natural Gas Pipeline Project) has implemented the Skycon CLM (Contract Lifecycle Management) solution to manage contract processes end to end in line with its digital transformation vision.
inci-s4: İnci Akü "Run for S/4" Project Has Gone Live!
inci-s4-sub: İnci GS Yuasa has successfully completed its transition from SAP R/3 to SAP S/4HANA. The project was carried out under the leadership of NTT Data Türkiye, while Skycon led the MM (Materials Management) module.
inci-s4-content:
İnci GS Yuasa, one of Türkiye's leading battery manufacturers, carried out its transition from SAP R/3 to SAP S/4HANA as part of its digital transformation vision.
Within this project, led by NTT Data Business Solutions Türkiye, Skycon took an active role in all analysis, design, development and testing activities of the Materials Management (MM) module.

Throughout the project, as Skycon we delivered:
  • MM module leadership: end-to-end responsibility for the MM module during the R/3 to S/4HANA transition, managing analysis, design, configuration and testing.
  • Redesign of procurement and inventory management processes: optimizing existing operations and aligning them with S/4HANA standards.
  • Handheld terminal integration: configuring screen designs, background functions and system connections for goods movements, enabling digital tracking of warehouse operations.
  • Team coordination: guiding the project team to ensure processes were completed accurately, completely and on time.
Carried out under the slogan "Run for S/4 – Sprint for Dual Transformation", this project became an important milestone in İnci GS Yuasa's goal of digital excellence across supply chain, production and logistics.

As Skycon, we are proud to have been part of this transformation in cooperation with NTT Data Business Solutions Türkiye.
tanap-wm: The WM Era Has Begun at TANAP
tanap-wm-sub: TANAP has activated the Warehouse Management (WM) module within its SAP landscape to optimize its logistics and warehouse management operations.
buyuk-s4-sub: Büyük Kulüp, one of Istanbul's most prestigious clubs with a long-standing heritage, continues its digital transformation journey with Skycon. Through the new reservation system, supplier portal integration and modern website projects, the club will offer its members a faster, more accessible and user-friendly digital experience.
buyuk-s4-content:
Büyük Kulüp (Cercle d'Orient), the distinguished social club serving its members in Istanbul's Çiftehavuzlar since 1882, has chosen Skycon for its digital transformation journey.

As Skycon, we have started working with Büyük Kulüp to deliver:
  • a new-generation reservation system for members,
  • a dedicated Supplier Portal for vendors,
  • a new website offering a contemporary user experience.

Büyük Kulüp announced this transformation to its members with the message: "Times are changing. So are we… Büyük Kulüp steps into the digital age, drawing strength from its roots."

As Skycon, we are proud to accompany Büyük Kulüp — with its heritage of more than 140 years — into the digital age.
tanap-vp: TANAP Vendor Portal Project Has Gone Live!
tanap-vp-sub: TANAP has implemented Skycon's proprietary Vendor Portal solution to digitalize its supply chain processes. Within the scope of this project, quotation collection, purchase order creation and supplier management processes have been fully digitalized end to end.
izmakpar: İzmakpar S/4HANA Project Is Now Live!
izmakpar-sub: The İzmakpar SAP S/4HANA Conversion Project, conducted under the leadership of NTT Data, has been successfully completed. İzmakpar, operating since 1997 in sheet metal, rubber and plastic mold manufacturing, achieved a modern transition to the S/4HANA platform. Skycon contributed to this transformation as part of the MM team.
kfg: Kout Food Group – SAP MDG Is Now Live!
kfg-sub: Kout Food Group, one of Kuwait's retail and restaurant chain operators, has successfully gone live with its SAP transformation project led by NTT. As Skycon, we are proud to have contributed to the establishment of a global-scale data management infrastructure as part of the Master Data Governance (MDG) team.
sisecam-sub: Within the SAP S/4HANA Conversion Project carried out under the leadership of NTT Data, we took an active role in the MM team. The project was implemented across locations in Türkiye, Italy, Georgia, India, Romania and Slovakia.
new_office-sub: The Skycon family is growing! Our new office at Biruni Technopark is now open. We are at our new location to deliver faster, more creative and more effective solutions for our R&D initiatives, software products and SAP projects.
new_hq: Skycon Moves to Its New HQ!
new_hq-sub: We have moved into our new workspace in Kadıköy. This modern and efficient office environment provides our teams with a stronger working experience while supporting our company's growth vision.
diler: Diler Holding S/4HANA Project Is Live!
diler-sub: Diler Iron and Steel's SAP digital transformation project was successfully carried out under the leadership of NTT Data. As Skycon, we took part in the MM module team, contributing to the modernization of processes and the enhancement of operational efficiency.
hayat: Hayat Holding S/4HANA Project Is Live!
hayat-sub: Hayat Kimya's SAP transformation project was successfully completed under the leadership of NTT Data, transitioning from R/3 to S/4HANA. As Skycon, we contributed within the MM team to modernizing procurement and materials management processes.
tofas-s4-sub: In the TOFAŞ S/4HANA Conversion project, Skycon took part in the Materials Management (MM) team. We are proud to support TOFAŞ's digital transformation by enhancing supply chain efficiency and strengthening data quality.
tupras-s4-sub: We took part in the ABAP/Fiori development team in TUPRISE — one of the most significant S/4HANA transformation programs in Türkiye's energy sector. We are proud to support Tüpraş in enhancing data integrity and enabling faster, insight-driven decision-making through this strategic digital upgrade.
kardemir-s4-sub: Founded in 1937 with Atatürk's vision of national industrialization, Türkiye's first integrated steel plant KARDEMİR has transitioned from R/3 to S/4HANA. As Skycon, we supported this historic institution's digital transformation within the MM team.
vp-meta-desc: Skycon Vendor Portal — a SAP-integrated supplier and tender management platform that fully digitalizes your supply chain. Supplier onboarding, RFQ, auctions, orders and KPI reports.
vp-hero-sub: An enterprise supplier platform that digitalizes your entire procurement process — from supplier onboarding to tendering, order tracking to KPI reports — integrating seamlessly with SAP.
vp-hero-live: Live at one of the region's largest energy infrastructure operators
vp-intro-text: Vendor Portal manages tendering processes with a flexible, customizable structure, allows suppliers to register themselves, and ensures seamless data flow with external systems such as SAP. With reporting tools for vendor and purchasing evaluations, it brings your end-to-end procurement operations together on a single platform.
vp-cap-sub: Everything your procurement operation needs, on one platform
vp-cap1-sub: Digitalizes your auction workflows — management, evaluation, approval and finalization all on one platform. Processes become fully transparent, traceable and auditable.
vp-cap2-sub: Easily create and send requests for proposals, then compare supplier offers to select the best solution. Your bidding process is standardized, saving time and reducing errors.
vp-cap3-sub: User roles define authority and access levels, ensuring only authorized individuals perform actions while enhancing overall system security.
vp-cap4-sub: Designed to integrate with existing ERP systems, especially SAP — ensuring data integrity, reducing manual workload and enabling seamless information flow across systems.
vp-cap5-sub: Suppliers can register themselves directly in the system, simplifying onboarding, reducing administrative effort and allowing faster participation in procurement.
vp-cap6-sub: Full visibility into procurement performance with tender analytics, supplier evaluation metrics and participation insights — a holistic view for data-driven decisions.
vp-feat-sub: Explore every step of the process through real product screenshots
vp-f1-text: Suppliers register independently on the platform, gain access to authorized tenders and can submit bids. Role-based access control ensures they only see what they are authorized to, dramatically simplifying onboarding and accelerating procurement participation.
vp-f1-cap: Supplier profile — general information, locations, users, bank accounts and documents on one screen.
vp-f2-text: Through self-service purchasing, users browse items with visuals, add them to a shopping cart and submit purchase requests directly via Vendor Portal — simplifying requisition creation and improving clarity.
vp-f2-cap: Create a purchase requisition from the catalogue — category tree, product visuals and shopping cart.
vp-f3-text: Requisitions can be created and edited in SAP or the Vendor Portal and quickly converted into RFQs. The RFQ overview page provides a centralized view of all requests, letting users track, evaluate and manage the entire process from a single screen.
vp-f3-cap: RFQ overview — centrally track all requests by status, type and category.
vp-f4-text: RFQs can be created from purchase requisitions or manually. Each RFQ goes through a defined approval workflow, ensuring compliance and accountability. Once approved, RFQs become the foundation for tender processes where suppliers bid in a structured, traceable manner.
vp-f4-cap: RFQ creation form — dates, project/purchasing group, currency and publication type on one screen.
vp-f5-text: Suppliers can be selected based on predefined sourcing criteria — most frequently sourced suppliers, material-group or commodity-based lists — targeting the most suitable vendors for each procurement process.
vp-f5-cap: Add bidders — filter and select suppliers by purchase history and material group.
vp-f6-text: Supplier bids are displayed in a structured view, enabling easy comparison of prices, delivery times and performance ratings. Customers can highlight preferred suppliers, request improved offers through the platform, and capture suppliers' Best and Final Offers (BAFO) at the end of the process.
vp-f6-cap: Quotation comparison — side-by-side prices, delivery dates and 'Best Offer' marking.
vp-f7-text: Suppliers can view and track all purchase orders assigned to them and create deliveries directly from the portal for open quantities. With Advanced Shipping Notification (ASN), delivery records are created and goods receipt is transparently tracked for each shipment.
vp-f7-cap: Order list and ASN — track planned, delivered and open quantities for each shipment.
vp-f8-text: Gain full visibility into procurement performance with interactive KPI reports. Beyond tender analytics, the reports include supplier evaluation metrics and supplier participation insights within the portal — supporting better decisions, stronger collaboration and cost efficiency.
vp-f8-cap: KPI dashboard — purchase amount, approval process, RFQ and supplier metrics on one screen.
vp-why-title: A modern alternative to traditional global platforms
vp-why-sub: More flexible, lower cost, with end-to-end SAP integration
vp-why1-text: Transparent pricing with no hidden fees. Budget-friendly and scalable.
vp-why2-text: An intuitive interface that's easy to adopt for all user types.
vp-why3-text: Built for easy ERP/SAP integration with minimal custom development.
vp-why4-text: An in-house team with deep functional and technical knowledge.
vp-sec-sub: Vendor Portal is built with a security-first mindset to protect your data and ensure compliance.
vp-sec1-text: Security is integrated into the architecture from the ground up.
vp-sec2-text: Role-based access ensures the right people have the right rights.
vp-sec3-text: Your data is protected with industry best practices and secure communication.
vp-sec4-text: Continuous monitoring and audit logging ensure transparency and traceability.
vp-sec5-text: Aligned with global security standards and compliance requirements.
vp-story-text: Our Vendor Portal and CLM solutions are actively used by one of the region's largest energy infrastructure operators. Supplier onboarding, tendering, contract management and collaboration processes are managed seamlessly integrated with SAP across multiple business units, high volumes of suppliers and complex procurement requirements.
vp-story-r3: Faster tender cycle and award process
vp-story-note: Reference contacts can be provided upon request.
vp-cta-title: See Vendor Portal in your business
vp-cta-sub: Contact our team for a personalized demo and let's discuss how we can transform your procurement processes.
